name: large_hourly_factory
description: Hourly electricity consumption of a manufacturing plant over ~14 months (~10,000 rows). Daily and weekly cycles plus a slow upward trend. Used as the LARGE dataset in the validator size stress-test.

columns.name: timestamp
columns.description: UTC timestamp at the start of the hour (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

columns.name: consumption_kwh
columns.description: Total electricity consumed by the plant during that hour in kilowatt-hours.

columns.name: temperature_c
columns.description: Outdoor temperature at the factory site in degrees Celsius.
